facts.jsx.element: jsx_opening_element.name -> TsxElementFact(name, root, intrinsic, self_closing, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.root, payload.intrinsic, payload.self_closing, span, line)
facts.jsx.intrinsic: lowercase jsx identifier or namespace -> intrinsic name
facts.jsx.root: member_expression root identifier -> primitive namespace root
facts.jsx.self_closing: jsx_self_closing_element.name -> TsxElementFact(name, root, intrinsic, self_closing, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.root, payload.intrinsic, payload.self_closing, span, line)
facts.primitive.imports: typescript import facts from configured sources -> PrimitiveImports
facts.primitive.usage: jsx element name or root matches primitive imports -> primitive usage flag

recovery.rule.continuation: JSX facts may emit outside broken subtrees
recovery.raw_ast.recovery: unknown token ranges remain source-backed raw text

spans.script.offset: host block start_line added to element line

diagnostics.embedded.expression: expression grammar diagnostic -> host diagnostic with offset

facts.dispatch.branch: switch_case full range -> TsDispatchBranchFact(span, line, lines) -> Fact(payload.lines, span, line)
facts.module.counts: import and export tokens -> TsFacts counts
facts.module.import: import_statement.source and import_clause -> TsImportFact(source, specifiers, span, line) -> Fact(payload.source, payload.type_only, payload.default_imports, payload.named_imports, payload.namespace_imports, span, line)
facts.name.binding: variable_declarator.name identifiers -> TsNameFact(kind:binding, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)
facts.name.function: function_declaration.name | function_expression.name -> TsNameFact(kind:function, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)
facts.name.method: method_definition.name | method_signature.name -> TsNameFact(kind:method, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)
facts.name.parameter: parameter pattern identifiers -> TsNameFact(kind:parameter, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)

recovery.raw_ast.recovery: unknown token ranges remain source-backed raw text

spans.diagnostic.range: parser range mapped through host offset
spans.script.offset: host block start_line added to fact line
